name: Canadian Take-Home Pay & Payroll Deductions 2026
methodology: Computed from the CanPay Insights open rules engine applying published CRA, Revenu Québec, and provincial/territorial 2026 rates (federal lowest rate 14%, CPP YMPE $74,600, CPP2 YAMPE $85,000, EI 1.63%/MIE $68,900). Basic personal amount only; excludes RRSP, benefits, and other credits.
